case_title: CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. VS BLATTEIS, RICHARD

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY BLATTEIS, RICHARD AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CERT LETTER TO RICHARD BLATTEIS RETURNED UNCLAIMED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22768, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. AS TO DEFENDANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, REMANDED FROM SUP. CT. SCA 22768 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BLATTEIS, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHERNOFF, ARTHUR B. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
